sections.paragraph: m. strong drink, intoxicating liquor, whether wine, Num 28:7, or intoxicating drink like wine, made from barley (Herod. ii. 77; Diod. i. 20, 34), or distilled from honey or dates (see Hieron. Opp. ed. Martianay, t. iv. p. 364). Arab. سَكَرُ wine made from dry grapes or dates. It is often distinguished from wine, Levit. 10:9 Num 6:3 Jud. 13:4 , Jdg 13:7in poetry there is often in one member שֵׁכָר, in the other יַיִן Isa 5:11 24:9 28:7 29:9 56:12 Pro 20:1 31:6 Mic 2:11.- Isa 5:22, wine mingled with spices appears to be intended, i.q. מֵסֶךְ, מֶזֶג.
